## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. Include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / Code cleanup
- [ ] CI / Build / Deployment changes

## How Has This Been Tested?

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] Manual testing performed
- [ ] No new warnings introduced

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards (PEP 8, type hints)
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (README.md, docstrings) as needed
- [ ] I have checked for any breaking changes and noted them above
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the PR here, such as screenshots, performance benchmarks, or deployment notes.
